author: AAA3A
opencode-contributor
name: Honeypot
install_msg:
Thank you for installing this cog!
Do `[p]help Honeypot` to get the list of commands and their description.
short: Create a honeypot channel to catch self-bots and scammers with purge, whitelist roles, fake activity, and mod review.
description: Create a honeypot channel at the top of the server to attract self-bots and scammers. Features include: configurable punishment (mute/kick/ban), automatic message purge for the last N minutes, whitelisted role exceptions, fake activity simulation to lure scammers, and optional moderator review queue with interactive buttons for manual judgment.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores moderation case metadata about detected users and messages in SQLite and publishes a summary, thread timeline, and captured attachment copies to a configured Discord review channel. Case evidence files are removed by resolution cleanup; the resolved Discord thread is locked and archived. Attachments selected as image-learning samples are copied to separate image-scan storage and may remain there under its own retention controls. Red user-data deletion and guild removal delete the matching Discord case workspace, local evidence, and case rows; unavailable Discord deletions remain queued for retry.
